mobileStateErrorTitle: We could not load this page
mobileStateErrorBody: Something went wrong. Please try again.
mobileStateOfflineBody: Reconnect to the internet, then try again.
mobileStateUnauthenticatedBody: Sign in to continue to this GoGoCash page.
mobileResourceEmptyBody: There is no {label} to show yet.
mobileResourceOfflineBody: Reconnect to the internet, then reload your {label}.
mobileResourceDisabledBody: Backend account data is disabled for this environment.
mobileWalletNotReadyBody: Your cashback wallet does not have any backend activity yet.
mobileMissingOrdersPurchaseHelp: Choose where you bought the item and enter the same order details you see in the store's app or confirmation email.
mobileMissingOrdersStoreHelper: Choose the partner where you completed the order.
mobileMissingOrdersNoteHelper: Add anything that helps our support team review the claim.
mobileReferralNotReadyBody: Invite friends to start building referral activity.
mobileMembershipFaqCurrencyAnswer: All membership charges are in Thai Baht (THB). The price you see is the price you pay.
mobileMembershipFaqCancelAnswer: Cancel from your account whenever you like. You keep access until the end of the period.
mobileMembershipFaqStartAnswer: Membership benefits start after checkout completes and follow the in-app eligibility rules.
mobileMembershipBillingSubtitle: Same membership - pick monthly flexibility or annual savings.
mobileMembershipPerkBoostBody: GoGoQuest and My Rating Score earn a 20% lift.
mobileMembershipPerkSupportBody: Member requests move through the support queue first.
mobileCreditScoreBenefitFreePassNote: Unlock when you stay Trusted for 3 consecutive months
mobileSubReviewBody: Review secure checkout, billing portal, and subscription status from one place.
mobileSubPricingBody: Cashback rewards, exclusive partner deals, and priority support - all in one plan.
mobileSubStripeBody: GoGoPass memberships use Stripe checkout. Open the membership page to compare plans.
mobileSubUnlockBody: Unlock GoGoPass to access exclusive benefits and manage future renewals from Billing.
mobileSubBillingPortalBody: Billing portal access appears here after GoGoPass checkout creates a Stripe customer.
mobileSubNotReadyBody: You do not have an active GoGoPass subscription yet.
mobileAuthCbSuccessBody: Your Firebase session was saved. Redirecting to GoGoCash.
mobileAuthCbMissingBody: Open the latest sign-in link and try again.
mobileAuthCbErrorBody: GoGoCash could not complete the secure token handoff.
mobileAuthCbPendingBody: Saving your Firebase token and preparing your GoGoCash session.
mobileProfileCompleteSetup: Complete your profile setup to unlock account actions.
mobileProfileLogoutBody: This clears your saved session on this device before returning to sign in.
mobileProfileOffersEmptyBody: Activate cashback offers to see your personal offer links here.
mobileProfileOffersBody: Activated cashback offers from your GoGoCash account, including each deeplink and created date.
mobilePhoneChangeBody: To keep your account secure, please enter current mobile phone number linked to your account before updating your phone number.
mobilePhoneVerifyBody: To keep your account secure, enter the mobile phone number linked to your account.
mobilePhoneSendCodeBody: We will send a verification code to confirm your number.
mobilePhoneResendWait: Please wait for 1 minute before requesting another code.
mobileW2_95: Username must be at least 3 characters.

mobileW2_138: Share GoGoCash and track referral rewards from one place.

mobileW2_158: PromptPay Citizen ID must be exactly 13 digits.
mobileW2_163: Must be a valid EVM address (e.g. 0x followed by 40 hex characters).

mobileW2_201: Cashback tracking assistant that watches supported shopping sessions and keeps activation evidence in one secure flow.
mobileW2_204: Complete these steps before GoGoSense starts detecting supported stores, checkout sessions, and missing cashback evidence.
mobileW2_207: GoGoSense never enables sensitive signals silently. Review why each permission is needed before opening device settings.
mobileW2_210: Review detected shopping sessions, activation status, and recovery tasks without exposing raw notification or screenshot content.
mobileW2_213: Tune GoGoSense detection sources and data minimization before the native detector is enabled.
mobileW2_216: Use recovery when a shopping session was not detected or a merchant asks for proof before validating cashback.
mobileW2_219: Check supported detection methods, activation status, and recovery options for this merchant.
mobileW2_221: Detect supported shopping apps and browser transitions.
mobileW2_223: Read only merchant tracking notifications needed for cashback evidence.
mobileW2_224: Allow user-submitted screenshots only when automatic tracking fails.
mobileW2_226: Grocery Galaxy opened from GoGoCash at 08:42.
mobileW2_229: Cashback click ID linked to merchant session.
mobileW2_232: Waiting for merchant confirmation before wallet credit.
mobileW2_238: Use app and browser transitions for supported merchant sessions.
mobileW2_239: Capture merchant confirmation notices after checkout.
mobileW2_241: Redact notification and screenshot data before upload.
mobileW2_242: Native detection stays disabled until the customer reviews each permission.
mobileW2_243: Recent sessions stay visible so missing cashback can be recovered quickly.
mobileW2_249: Every step is explicit so GoGoSense never looks like a hidden tracker.
mobileW2_251: These controls map to native OS permission prompts and privacy-policy wording.
mobileW2_254: Only the state needed for cashback support is shown here.
mobileW2_257: Default settings favor the smallest useful data set.
mobileW2_258: Recovery accepts customer-provided evidence only after automatic tracking misses.
mobileW2_259: Submit one receipt or checkout screenshot for review.
mobileW2_261: Support can compare the screenshot to the merchant tracking window.
mobileW2_264: Merchant support is explicit so unsupported flows do not look tracked.
mobileW2_266: GoGoLink activation, supported app transitions, and merchant notification matching.
mobileW2_268: Use recovery when the session is missing from the timeline.
mobileW2_273: Paste a product or shop link first.
mobileW2_274: Please paste a valid product or shop link.
mobileW2_283: Find cashback deals from stores in Health & Beauty. Search and sort to narrow results.
mobileW2_287: Try another brand or clear the search field.
mobileSec_300: Purchases made through partner links may be subject to the merchant's terms, return policies, and eligibility rules for cashback or rewards. GoGoCash displays offers for information; final pricing and availability are set by the partner.
